task1.title: Maps: Beechwood Farm and Surroundings (1960 vs Present)
task1.prompt:
The maps below show the Beechwood Farm and its surroundings in 1960 and at the present day.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Longer School Holidays - Advantages and Disadvantages
task2.prompt:
In some countries, school holidays are getting longer.

Do you think the advantages of this trend outweigh the disadvantages?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
